data.title: Lennox acquires NSI Industries' HVAC division to enhance portfolio with DuroDyne and Supco brands, benefiting customers.
data.description: Lennox, a prominent provider of energy-efficient climate control solutions, has broadened its range of HVAC parts and supplies by incorporating the DuroDyne and Supco brands into its portfolio. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's ability to cater to the needs of both residential and commercial customers. The announcement was made in Dallas on October 16, 2025. Lennox, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol LII, finalized the expansion to better serve its clientele.

data.title: CMC to acquire Foley Products Company, becoming third largest in the US in precast industry with strong EBITDA margins.
data.description: The recent acquisition has significantly expanded CMC's precast platform, establishing CMC as the third-largest company in the United States. This acquisition has also positioned CMC as a top player in the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast regions. The addition of this top-tier precast operator has enhanced CMC's portfolio, bringing with it industry-leading EBITDA margins and a strong cash flow profile.

data.title: DeriW experiencing rapid growth after mainnet launch, redefining perp DEX standards, becoming a CEX rival with increasing spotlight.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 16, 2025, DeriW, a decentralized futures trading platform developed by CoinW, has experienced significant expansion since its mainnet introduction. The perp DEX sector is gaining attention, with rapid development driven by a growing influx of users.

data.title: Deel raises $300M in funding led by Ribbit Capital, valuing the company at $17.3B, following record performance.
data.description: In New York, Deel, a prominent global HR and payroll platform, revealed a significant development today. The company secured a noteworthy $300 million strategic investment from new backer Ribbit Capital, alongside existing partners Andreessen Horowitz and Coatue Management, and further backing from General Catalyst, Green Bay Ventures, and others. Following this investment, Deel is now valued at $17.3 billion. This funding round comes after a stellar year for Deel, with September 2025 marking the third consecutive year of outstanding performance for the company.

data.title: Tapestry, Inc. will discuss fiscal 2026 Q1 results via conference call at 8:00 a.m. (ET) on Nov. 6, 2025. Call ID: 7269452. Website: www.tapestry.com/investors.
data.description: Tapestry, Inc. will be conducting a conference call on November 6, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. (ET) to discuss its fiscal 2026 first quarter results. These results will be released earlier that morning via a press release. To participate in the corporate call, dial 1-866-847-4217 or 1-203-518-9845 and enter Conference ID 7269452. An audio webcast can be accessed at www.tapestry.com/investors. A replay of the call will be available for five days. Tapestry, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol TPR.

data.title: US Foods (NYSE: USFD) to host Q3 2025 financial results conference call on Nov 6, 2025, at 8am CST. Dial 877-344-2001 to join. Conference ID: 2528845. Replay available.
data.description: US Foods Holding Corp. (NYSE: USFD) based in Rosemont, Illinois, is set to hold a conference call and webcast on November 6, 2025, at 8 a.m. CST to review their third quarter financial results. Those interested can join the call by dialing 877-344-2001, with a Conference ID of 2528845 required for connection. Participants are advised to dial in 10 minutes before the call's start time. A replay of the call will be accessible afterward. For more details on accessing the replay, interested parties should register.

data.title: Potassium Fluoride Market to reach $0.52 billion by 2032; report covers various forms, purities, and applications.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on October 16, 2025, a report regarding the Potassium Fluoride Market was released. The report covers various aspects including different forms of potassium fluoride such as solid and liquid, purity levels ranging from 95-99% and over 99%, and multiple applications like fluorination & analytical reagent, glass etching, flux, metal surface treatment, catalyst, electrolyte additive, and agrochemical.

data.title: BMO to sell 138 branches, open 150 new branches over 5 years to support growth in core markets.
data.description: BMO is set to sell 138 branches in specific markets as part of strategic efforts to reallocate capital and resources. In contrast, they aim to open 150 new branches within the next five years in key markets to facilitate sustained client and business expansion. This decision was made known in Toronto and Chicago on October 16, 2025. The company's ticker symbols on the Toronto and New York stock exchanges are BMO.

data.title: TARS Robotics launches WIYH dataset for embodied intelligence training, accessible in Dec 2025. #AI #TARS #WIYH.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, TARS Robotics, a company supported by Lanchi Ventures, introduced World In Your Hands (WIYH), marking the commencement of the world's premier extensive real-world project. TARS Robotics focuses on AI-driven embodied intelligence and offers cutting-edge robotic hardware, data, and model innovations.

data.title: Insteel Industries Inc. reports Q4 2025 results: $14.6 million net earnings, $177.4 million net sales, $28.6 million gross profit.
data.description: In Mount Airy, N.C., Insteel Industries Inc. (NYSE: IIIN), the leading manufacturer of steel wire reinforcing products for U.S. concrete construction, revealed financial outcomes for Q4 and fiscal year ending on September 27, 2025. Q4 2025 Highlights: Net earnings amounted to $14.6 million, translating to $0.74 per diluted share, while net sales reached $177.4 million. The company recorded a gross profit of $28.6 million, representing 16.1% of net sales.
